creator: jim@phrantic.phear.net
text:
On Thu, 15 Apr 1999 at 10:16:44 +1000, jim@phrantic.phear.net wrote:
> >Number:         11140
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       update port: ascd-0.10.1 to 0.11
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       non-critical
> >Priority:       medium
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
> >State:          open
[snip..]
> >Description:
> 
> Patch updates the ascd port from 0.10.1 to 0.11.  The new version is a
> major update with a new interface and more.  The update also uses
> 'USE_INTERACTIVE' because the configure script asks questions.

Please close this PR.  The author has just released 0.12.0 and I'll be
submitting a patch to upgrade 0.10.1 to it shortly.

Thanks,
